test_patch:
diff --git a/server/evaluator_test.go b/server/evaluator_test.go
--- a/server/evaluator_test.go
+++ b/server/evaluator_test.go
@@ -3,12 +3,15 @@ package server
 import (
 	"context"
+	"errors"
+	"fmt"
 	"testing"
 
 	"github.com/gofrs/uuid"
-	"github.com/markphelps/flipt/errors"
+	errs "github.com/markphelps/flipt/errors"
 	flipt "github.com/markphelps/flipt/rpc"
 	"github.com/markphelps/flipt/storage"
+	"github.com/sirupsen/logrus"
 	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
 	"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock"
 	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
 )
@@ -67,7 +70,7 @@ func TestEvaluate_FlagNotFound(t *testing.T) {
 		}
 	)
 
-	store.On("GetFlag", mock.Anything, "foo").Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errors.ErrNotFoundf("flag %q", "foo"))
+	store.On("GetFlag", mock.Anything, "foo").Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errs.ErrNotFoundf("flag %q", "foo"))
 
 	resp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), &flipt.EvaluationRequest{
 		EntityId: "1",
@@ -1962,3 +1965,162 @@ func Test_matchesBool(t *testing.T) {
 		})
 	}
 }
+
+func TestBatchEvaluate_DisabledValue(t *testing.T) {
+	var (
+		store  = &storeMock{}
+		logger = logrus.New()
+		s      = &Server{
+			logger: logger,
+			store:  store,
+		}
+	)
+
+	store.On("GetFlag", mock.Anything, "foo").Return(&flipt.Flag{Key: "foo", Enabled: true}, nil)
+	store.On("GetFlag", mock.Anything, "bar").Return(&flipt.Flag{Key: "bar", Enabled: false}, nil)
+	store.On("GetEvaluationRules", mock.Anything, "foo").Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, nil)
+
+	resp, err := s.BatchEvaluate(context.TODO(), &flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest{
+		RequestId: "12345",
+		Requests: []*flipt.EvaluationRequest{
+			{EntityId: "1", FlagKey: "foo", Context: map[string]string{"bar": "boz"}},
+			{EntityId: "1", FlagKey: "bar"},
+		},
+	})
+
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	require.Equal(t, 2, len(resp.Responses))
+
+	assert.Equal(t, "disabled", resp.Responses[1].Value)
+	assert.NotEqual(t, "", resp.Responses[1].Value)
+	assert.NotEqual(t, "DISABLED", resp.Responses[1].Value)
+	assert.NotEqual(t, "off", resp.Responses[1].Value)
+}
+
+func TestBatchEvaluate_DisabledDuration(t *testing.T) {
+	var (
+		store  = &storeMock{}
+		logger = logrus.New()
+		s      = &Server{
+			logger: logger,
+			store:  store,
+		}
+	)
+
+	store.On("GetFlag", mock.Anything, "foo").Return(&flipt.Flag{Key: "foo", Enabled: true}, nil)
+	store.On("GetFlag", mock.Anything, "bar").Return(&flipt.Flag{Key: "bar", Enabled: false}, nil)
+	store.On("GetEvaluationRules", mock.Anything, "foo").Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, nil)
+
+	resp, err := s.BatchEvaluate(context.TODO(), &flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest{
+		RequestId: "12345",
+		Requests: []*flipt.EvaluationRequest{
+			{EntityId: "1", FlagKey: "foo", Context: map[string]string{"bar": "boz"}},
+			{EntityId: "1", FlagKey: "bar"},
+		},
+	})
+
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	require.Equal(t, 2, len(resp.Responses))
+
+	assert.True(t, resp.Responses[0].RequestDurationMillis > 0)
+	assert.Equal(t, float64(0), resp.Responses[1].RequestDurationMillis)
+}
+
+func TestBatchEvaluate_SharedTimestamp(t *testing.T) {
+	var (
+		store  = &storeMock{}
+		logger = logrus.New()
+		s      = &Server{
+			logger: logger,
+			store:  store,
+		}
+	)
+
+	store.On("GetFlag", mock.Anything, "foo").Return(&flipt.Flag{Key: "foo", Enabled: true}, nil)
+	store.On("GetFlag", mock.Anything, "bar").Return(&flipt.Flag{Key: "bar", Enabled: false}, nil)
+	store.On("GetFlag", mock.Anything, "baz").Return(&flipt.Flag{Key: "baz", Enabled: true}, nil)
+	store.On("GetEvaluationRules", mock.Anything, "foo").Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, nil)
+	store.On("GetEvaluationRules", mock.Anything, "baz").Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, nil)
+
+	resp, err := s.BatchEvaluate(context.TODO(), &flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest{
+		RequestId: "12345",
+		Requests: []*flipt.EvaluationRequest{
+			{EntityId: "1", FlagKey: "foo", Context: map[string]string{"bar": "boz"}},
+			{EntityId: "1", FlagKey: "bar"},
+			{EntityId: "1", FlagKey: "baz"},
+		},
+	})
+
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	require.Equal(t, 3, len(resp.Responses))
+
+	require.NotNil(t, resp.Responses[0].Timestamp)
+	require.NotNil(t, resp.Responses[1].Timestamp)
+	require.NotNil(t, resp.Responses[2].Timestamp)
+	assert.Equal(t, resp.Responses[0].Timestamp.AsTime(), resp.Responses[1].Timestamp.AsTime())
+	assert.Equal(t, resp.Responses[1].Timestamp.AsTime(), resp.Responses[2].Timestamp.AsTime())
+	assert.True(t, resp.Responses[2].RequestDurationMillis >= resp.Responses[0].RequestDurationMillis,
+		"third entry took longer than first, proving timestamps are not derived from duration")
+}
+
+func TestBatchEvaluate_EntryIdFormat(t *testing.T) {
+	var (
+		store  = &storeMock{}
+		logger = logrus.New()
+		s      = &Server{
+			logger: logger,
+			store:  store,
+		}
+	)
+
+	store.On("GetFlag", mock.Anything, "foo").Return(&flipt.Flag{Key: "foo", Enabled: true}, nil)
+	store.On("GetFlag", mock.Anything, "bar").Return(&flipt.Flag{Key: "bar", Enabled: false}, nil)
+	store.On("GetEvaluationRules", mock.Anything, "foo").Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, nil)
+
+	resp, err := s.BatchEvaluate(context.TODO(), &flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest{
+		RequestId: "12345",
+		Requests: []*flipt.EvaluationRequest{
+			{EntityId: "1", FlagKey: "foo", Context: map[string]string{"bar": "boz"}},
+			{EntityId: "1", FlagKey: "bar"},
+		},
+	})
+
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	require.Equal(t, 2, len(resp.Responses))
+
+	assert.Equal(t, fmt.Sprintf("%s:%s", "12345", "foo"), resp.Responses[0].RequestId)
+	assert.Equal(t, fmt.Sprintf("%s:%s", "12345", "bar"), resp.Responses[1].RequestId)
+	assert.NotEqual(t, "", resp.Responses[0].RequestId)
+	assert.NotEqual(t, "12345", resp.Responses[0].RequestId)
+}
+
+func TestBatchEvaluate_PartialOnHardError(t *testing.T) {
+	var (
+		store  = &storeMock{}
+		logger = logrus.New()
+		s      = &Server{
+			logger: logger,
+			store:  store,
+		}
+	)
+
+	store.On("GetFlag", mock.Anything, "foo").Return(&flipt.Flag{Key: "foo", Enabled: true}, nil)
+	store.On("GetFlag", mock.Anything, "err_flag").Return((*flipt.Flag)(nil), errors.New("storage failure"))
+	store.On("GetFlag", mock.Anything, "baz").Return(&flipt.Flag{Key: "baz", Enabled: true}, nil)
+	store.On("GetEvaluationRules", mock.Anything, "foo").Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, nil)
+
+	resp, err := s.BatchEvaluate(context.TODO(), &flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest{
+		RequestId: "67890",
+		Requests: []*flipt.EvaluationRequest{
+			{EntityId: "1", FlagKey: "foo"},
+			{EntityId: "1", FlagKey: "err_flag"},
+			{EntityId: "1", FlagKey: "baz"},
+		},
+	})
+
+	assert.Error(t, err)
+	assert.NotNil(t, resp)
+	assert.Equal(t, 1, len(resp.Responses))
+	assert.False(t, resp.Responses[0].Match)
+	store.AssertNotCalled(t, "GetEvaluationRules", mock.Anything, "baz")
+}
